name: URL to Markdown Link
description:
Converts bare URLs to proper Markdown links [Page Title](url) by fetching each page's <title> tag.

Function 1 — selection to links
Select text containing bare URLs, then right-click › Convert URLs in selection to Markdown links (or assign a shortcut such as Ctrl+Shift+K in Settings › Shortcuts).

Function 2 — clipboard URL to link
Copy a URL to the clipboard, then invoke Paste clipboard URL as Markdown link (suggested shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+W, assign in Settings › Shortcuts) to insert a resolved Markdown link at the cursor position.

Smart title trimming is applied:
• Site-name suffixes (Article – Site, Article | Site, etc.) are stripped.
• GitHub / GitLab / Bitbucket / Codeberg issue and pull-request metadata (by user · PR #N · owner/repo) is removed, leaving only the actual issue or PR title.
